MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Charles Frederick Bourdon, Esq. of BOURDON & REISMAN 626-5134, for defendants Johnnie L. Cochran, Jr. and Stuart Hanlon, moving for summary judgment
Robert Bloom appearing in propria persona 510/595-7766, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT JOHNNIE L COCHRAN, JR. AND STUART HANLON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / summary adjudication:
Motion for summary judgment - denied. Motion for summary adjudication: as to 1st c/a (breach of oral agreement) - granted; as to 2nd c/a (Quantum Meruit) - denied, failure to shift burden re: entitlement to compensation in Quantum Meruit.
Defendant is to prepare an order. (DAG/301/DR) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
